title: apodanthes berteroi
intro: Apodanthes berteroi is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, specifically Hawaii and Tahiti. It is also known as the "yellow passion vine" due to its bright yellow flowers and twining habit. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. Apodanthes berteroi can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
